meta.title: Visa Packages — Continuous Progress Tracker
meta.description: Machine-readable tracker for Claude Code autonomous loop. Drives every country to its configured target phase. Mirror the human-readable status in visa-packages-status.md.

phaseDefinitions.0: Not started — no wizard, no submission module
phaseDefinitions.1: Schema/recon scaffolded — selectors or scope docs only, no orchestrator
phaseDefinitions.2: Client wizard complete, backend stops pre-auth or absent
phaseDefinitions.3: Backend autofill operational, halts before submit/pay/sign — no application-ID callback
phaseDefinitions.4: End-to-end: wizard complete, backend submits or hands off, application reference returned to user

phase3Acceptance: viza-be/submission-service/src/<country>/run.ts exports fillXApplication(credentials, answers) returning a typed result
Orchestrator walks every form page/step until immediately before submit/pay/sign
Result captures any pre-pay reference (TRN/registrationCode/draftReference) and lists fieldsFilled/fieldsSkipped
Errors typed in src/<country>/errors.ts: SESSION_EXPIRED, VALIDATION_FAILED, GATE_DETECTED at minimum
Wizard config exists at viza-fe/internal-website/components/client/wizards/<cc>/config.ts with steps + payload builder
npm run type-check passes in viza-be/submission-service and viza-fe/internal-website
phase4Acceptance: Submission, signing, or external-pay handoff implemented; reference (TRN / VAF# / registrationCode) flows back to the applicant
Callback or polling captures the post-submit reference into submission_queue / application row
meta.loopHaltReason: All remaining open stories require live recon against a real government portal (UK, EG-02, ID-01, IT, AU-08). VP-IT-02 (Annex I PDF) blocked separately on flat-PDF/no-AcroForm. Loop ran VP-INFRA-01, VP-INFRA-02, VP-EG-01, VP-AU-05/06/07 successfully.

au.note: Phase 4 = HTML signature pad + /signing route + post-Review submit; payment skipped

vn.note: Phase 3→4 (external pay + email PDF ingestion) deferred — payment provider not configured

italy-vfs-cn.note: Scope = VFS appointment autofill + Annex I PDF pre-fill (paper form). NOT online form fill.

egypt.note: Wizard scaffolded (VP-EG-01). Backend recon (VP-EG-02) blocked on live recon run.

indonesia.note: Wizard scaffolded (VP-ID-02). Backend orchestrator (VP-ID-03) still needs live recon.

loopInstructions.pickStrategy: Pick the story with the lowest priority number where passes:false AND blocked:false AND every id in dependsOn is passes:true AND countries[story.country].deferred !== true. Ties broken by countries[story.country].targetPhase - countries[story.country].phase (smaller first).
perIterationSteps: Implement only that story; keep diff minimal
Run `npm run type-check` in any package modified
If checks pass: commit with message format `<type>(<scope>): <description>` per .claude/CLAUDE.md commit standards
Flip the story's passes:true and append a dated entry to progress log
If all story.passes === true OR all atTarget === true, output <promise>COMPLETE</promise>
loopInstructions.stopCondition: Every non-deferred country has atTarget === true
outOfScope: Country marked deferred:true (japan, korea) — skip entirely
Live recon that requires a preregistered government account that is not yet provisioned — escalate by setting story.blocked=true with reason instead of attempting

stories.title: two-captcha solver extracted into shared module
acceptance: Generic solveCaptcha(siteKey, pageUrl, type) helper reading TWOCAPTCHA_API_KEY from env
CEAC orchestrator switched to use shared module — no behavior change
Module exported from src/captcha/index.ts for UK / EG / IT / ID consumers

stories.title: per-applicant portal credential schema + Edward seed (UK + EG)
acceptance: Migrations applied
Edward UK + EG rows seeded
type-check passes
stories.note: Done as a one-shot to unblock the loop. Italy + AU rows still empty pending creds.

stories.title: harvest post-auth UK Standard Visitor form selectors via authenticated recon
stories.blockedReason: needs human-in-the-loop live recon run against gov.uk visa portal
acceptance: form-recon.ts authenticates via uk_accounts row (loadUkAccount) and walks every form page after registration (~222 fields per gap report)
Output JSON committed under docs/uk-visa-recon-<date>.json with stable selector list keyed by page slug

stories.title: map UK post-auth selectors into UK_FIELD_MAPPINGS
acceptance: UK_FIELD_MAPPINGS exported, typed against the wizard payload shape
Every required field in the recon JSON has a mapping; optional fields commented

stories.title: wire UK orchestrator past registration through to halt-before-pay
acceptance: fillUkApplication(credentials, answers) returns UkFillResult { status, applicationReference?, fieldsFilled, fieldsSkipped }
Halts on the payment / declaration page before charge
Errors: SESSION_EXPIRED, VALIDATION_FAILED, GATE_DETECTED

stories.title: fixture-driven UK orchestrator integration test
acceptance: Test fills a fixture wizard payload and asserts halt page reached
Test runs under existing submission-service test runner

stories.title: live recon walk for Italy VFS appointment booking flow
stories.blockedReason: Requires it_vfs_cn_accounts row for Edward (creds not yet provisioned). Unblock once seeded.
acceptance: Recon walk covers VFS login → centre selection → appointment slot picker → confirmation
Captures selectors against existing IT_VFS_*_FIELDS maps; mismatches reported

stories.title: Italy Annex I (Schengen short-stay) PDF pre-fill generator
stories.blockedReason: user-supplied /Users/gel/Desktop/visa-application-form-schengen-short-term.pdf has 0 AcroForm fields — pdf-lib field-filling impossible against a flat PDF. Needs either (a) an AcroForm-fillable source copy of the Annex I form, or (b) a human-approved pivot to coordinate-based text overlay (~90 fields by x/y coords).
acceptance: fillAnnexIPdf(answers) returns a Buffer of the official Schengen Annex I PDF with applicant data overlaid via pdf-lib AcroForm fields
Reuses the shared schengen wizard payload shape — no Italy-specific input contract

stories.title: Italy VFS appointment booking orchestrator (run.ts)
stories.blockedReason: Depends on VP-IT-01 which is creds-blocked.
acceptance: fillItalyVfsApplication(credentials, answers) logs into VFS, books appointment, captures appointment_reference, emits Annex I PDF artifact, halts before any payment
Honors LoginFailedError, CorridorIneligibleError

stories.title: Italy VFS orchestrator integration test
acceptance: Fixture-driven walk to halt boundary + asserts Annex I PDF generated

stories.title: egypt wizard schema + payload builder
acceptance: Wizard config follows neighbouring au/ and vn/ shape
All fields keyed to visa2egypt.gov.eg page structure documented in docs/egypt-visa-scope.md

stories.title: egypt phase-B authenticated recon
stories.blockedReason: needs human-in-the-loop live recon run against visa2egypt.gov.eg
acceptance: Authenticated walk via loadEgAccount() captures every selector through halt-before-submit

stories.title: egypt orchestrator halting before submit
acceptance: fillEgyptApplication(credentials, answers) returns EgFillResult
Halts before payment
Typed errors

stories.title: indonesia phase-A recon walk + scope verification
stories.passNote: Schema reconstruction satisfied via viza-be/agent-backend/scripts/seed-id-c1-tourist-form-fields.ts (header documents source URLs and explicitly states `live-portal QA pass deferred per playbook`). Live recon still pending for VP-ID-03 (backend selectors).
acceptance: Public-page recon committed; selector skeleton drafted; per-application UUID flow documented

stories.title: indonesia wizard config
acceptance: Wizard mirrors vn/ shape; payload builder typed

stories.title: indonesia field mappings + orchestrator halt-before-pay
stories.blockedReason: needs human-in-the-loop live recon run against evisa.imigrasi.go.id — per-application UUID URLs require a real session to enumerate selectors
acceptance: fillIndonesiaApplication() returns typed result and halts before payment; per-app UUID URL accepted as input

stories.title: client signature-pad component + Annex I-style declaration preview
acceptance: Native HTML5 canvas signature pad (no third-party vendor)
Outputs PNG (transparent bg) at 600×200 px @ 2× DPR
Declaration preview renders the AU Visitor 600 character + health declarations the applicant is signing
Follows viza-fe/internal-website/frontend.md — brand-* tokens, shadcn primitives, no raw hex

stories.title: add Signing step to /client journey timeline
acceptance: New step inserted between 'Application filled' and 'Submitted'
i18n strings added (en + zh)
Next-action card surfaces 'Sign your declaration' when application is filled but unsigned

stories.title: /client/signing/[applicationId] route + submitSignature server action
acceptance: Server action validates signature PNG, persists to applications table (signature_storage_path) + Supabase storage
Updates submission_queue.status to 'au_prefill_pending' on success
Page guards against non-AU applications + already-signed state

stories.title: AU sign-and-submit: post-Review submit + TRN callback
stories.blockedReason: needs human-in-the-loop live recon run — post-Review ImmiAccount selectors are not mapped (the existing au-visitor orchestrator deliberately halts at Review). Driving past Review requires live ImmiAccount session to harvest declaration / sign-and-submit selectors.
acceptance: Loads signature PNG from Supabase storage (signature_storage_path on the application row)
Drives the AU declaration page to attach the signature image, submits, captures final TRN
Writes TRN to submission_queue.au_trn + updates application.confirmation_number
Halts gracefully on payment page (payment provider not yet configured)

stories.title: AU sign-and-submit integration test
acceptance: Fixture signature + fixture answers walk through to TRN capture (mocked Playwright pages)
